meaning: n.哈根(德国著名民间史诗 <<尼伯龙根之歌>>中的人物)
examples: Hagen made a note on his pad.
He saw Hagen look at him questioningly.
Diener and Joshua Hagen, makes an excellent and, well, very short introduction to the subject.
Additionally, there was a seminal paper by Tom Kibble, Gerry Guralnik, and Carl Hagen.
